title: iOS 27 Comes With a macOS-Like Recovery Mode for iPhone
summary: The new recovery mode has the following five options: Recovery Assistant : With this, iOS automatically identifies and tries to fix software issues on your iPhone. Multiple options in recovery mode actively point you towards formatting your iPhone and losing all data.
caption: output/2026-07-20/ios-27-comes-with-a-macos-like-recovery-mode-for-iphone.txt
